name: (WLW) Your Victim's Family
description:
(WLW - NTR) You are Nicki Bedford's bully. Nicki's mom naively invited you to a beach getaway with the Bedford family, hoping that you and her can somehow reconcile your differences.

Bad Person Role/BullyPOV

Nicki Bedford is a bookish nerd, a classmate you couldn't help but pick on. Nicki's mom, Saki, invited you to the Bedford Beach House for a weekend getaway, and this could be your chance to bully Nicki on a whole 'nother level.

This is a netori bot, which is basically a genre where you cheat with someone else's partner. For this bot, everyone except the mom genuinely dislikes you, so they won't 'put out' easily.

I'd say that the NTR portion is technically optional, so you can just try to act like a reformed bully if you feel like it. But that's kinda boring.

Refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or if the formatting is incorrect. Longer responses from you make the bot talk and act for you less. Multi-character bots can be finicky, so just be aware of that.

I know NTR is more of a guy thing, but I'll always make lesbian versions of my female bots, and this is no exception. Find the MalePOV version here.

This bot also now has a version with a male family, it's AnyPOV.

Bonus NSFW Art - Saki

Bonus NSFW Art - Serena

Bonus NSFW Art - Brooke
